scope: scientifically equivalent CUDA execution optimization of the frozen H1a coordinate trainer; no model, objective, probability path, data order, seed, exposure, or checkpoint state changes

optimization.single_candidate: fused AdamW parameter update with gradient-norm scalar materialized only at the existing synchronized logging boundary

decision_boundary: Retain the optimized production step only if every equivalence check passes and the median synchronized throughput improves by at least 10% without more than 5% peak-memory growth. Failure leaves the archived scientific checkpoint and all H1a conclusions unchanged. This protocol does not authorize more training, tensor conditioning, H1b-H6, oracle work, relaxation, DFT, or DFPT.
